response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His open-source contributions and architectural breadth demonstrate deep engineering maturity, though his lack of explicit Nest.js or Kotlin/Java project mentions and basic German language skills are minor gaps.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators
Strong open-source contributions and testing culture (Vitest, TDD, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in professional projects despite being secondary stack requirements
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Germany-based team
Resume lacks detail on relational database usage (PostgreSQL/MySQL) and explicit security/auth implementation experience
